name: 9q34_TSC1_paralog_region
description: 9q34.13 region containing TSC1 (Tuberous Sclerosis Complex 1) plus the subtelomeric SD-rich 9q34. Has intermediate SDs that mediate rare large deletions encompassing TSC1; also harbors ABL1 (BCR-ABL fusion partner in CML).

architecture.internal_structure: Small to intermediate SD blocks throughout 9q34 around TSC1, ABL1, NOTCH1, VAV2; subtelomeric WASH/FAM86 families at the very telomere; rare large TSC1-encompassing deletions.
